summary: open-agents-ai ships postinstall daemon performing system reconnaissance and HTTP exfiltration
details: package.json declares both preinstall and postinstall lifecycle hooks invoking curl, and ships dist/postinstall-daemon.cjs which combines child_process.execSync, os.userInfo(), filesystem probing (fs.existsSync), ping reconnaissance, and outbound http.request GET calls. The daemon collects host identity (os.userInfo) and process/system information at install time and ships it to a network endpoint over HTTP. Combined with curl invocations from the preinstall/postinstall lifecycle hooks, installing this package causes the installer's machine to execute reconnaissance code without consent and emit host data to an attacker-reachable endpoint. The composition (lifecycle curl + a separately shipped daemon module wiring child_process + os + http together) is the exfiltration shape, not a documented build/runtime fetch.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
